reason: Acceptance criteria AC1-AC10 are the verification target. Definition of Done lists test layers.
Cross-layer data flow + failure semantics. Checks must verify each skipped_reason path is exercised.
Per-step validation commands + review gates. Each gate is a check item.
phi formula and direction convention must match source byte-for-byte; checks must verify.
Spike algorithm constants + step ordering must match; checks verify wormhole branch and cap behaviour.
pytest scope and forbidden patterns; deterministic baseline output is a hard requirement (AC6).
Verify new errors (matrix-load failure, builder failure) follow ServiceError conventions where applicable; degrade-quietly path doesn't surface ServiceError.
Verify 3 new Prometheus metrics use low-cardinality labels (kb_name + outcome only); skipped reasons go to structured logs not metrics labels.
Verify the spike on/off toggle propagates correctly across rebuild → search → debug payload.
Verify atomic-write, cosine, iter_canonical_tags_with_vectors are reused not duplicated.
